name: Chocolate Chip Banana Muffin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease a muffin tin or insert paper liners.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar with an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
4. Add the egg and combine well with the banana mixture, which has had baking soda dissolved in hot water.
5. In a smaller bowl, whisk together flour, salt, nutmeg, chopped walnuts (if using), and chocolate chips.
6. Gently fold the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients until just combined.
7. Spoon the batter into the prepared muffin tin, dividing evenly among each cup.
8. Decorate the top of each muffin with a half walnut if desired.
9. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Remove from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
